                                                    appointment Rajajinagar Book Now Nagarbhavi Book Now Koramangala Book Now Our Founder and Directors Dr. Venkatappa H M MBBS, MD.,F.I.C.A., F.C.C.P (USA) FOUNDER, MANAGING DIRECTOR & PHYSICIAN It is indeed a great privilege for me and my team to present Kanva Diagnostic Services Private Limited in Bangalore We have been inculcating the tradition, expertise, experience, accuracy
                                                from the last 25 years in delivering affordable healthcare services in a
                                                patient-friendly environment, with a strong belief in ethical and
                                                transparent medical practices. Kanva Diagnostic Services has established
                                                itself as a comprehensive healthcare system in Bangalore, providing
                                                diagnostic services that include the latest equipment with cutting edge
                                                technology. Our facilities at Rajajinagar and Nagarbhavi are not just
                                                Diagnostic centres. It is truly a Health City, with state-of-the-art
                                                healthcare delivery system. We offer a blend of the finest medical
                                                diagnostic services with compassion and a patient centric approach,
                                                within the reach of everyone. Our staff are very well trained
                                                professionals who treat every patient with love and care. Dr H V Vasudha MBBS, MD Director & Consultant Radiologist Dr H V Vasudha is the Director of Kanva Diagnostic Services a
                                                distinguished Radiologist. She has been an eminent student throughout
                                                her academics and she graduated from Dr Ambedkar Medical college,
                                                Bangalore in the year 1999. She pursued her post graduate course in
                                                radiology from Sri Adichunchunagiri Medical College, Bellur. She is a
                                                gold medalist in MD Radiology from Rajeev Gandhi University in the year
                                                2004. Her special interests are in ultrasonography, female imaging and
                                                obstetrics scanning Dr H V Vyshakh MBBS, DMRD, DNB, FRCR Director & Consultant Radiologist Dr H V Vyshakh is a renowned Radiologist and Director of Kanva
                                                Diagnostic Services. He is a distinguished student throughout his career
                                                and is a state rank holder in SSLC & PUC. He completed MBBS at St Johnâ€™s
                                                Medical College and was awarded the best outgoing student of the year
                                                2004. He completed DMRD from Madras Medical College, Chennai and DNB,
                                                Radiology from Amrita Institute of Medical Sciences & Research Centre,
                                                Cochin. He obtained FRCR degree, London in 2012. He has undergone one
                                                year fellowship in Vascular & Intervention Radiology from CMC Vellore
                                                Medical College. His special interests are in cross sectional imaging, CT, MRI &
                                                Interventional procedures. Dr. Priyanka Viswanath MBBS, MS - Obstetrics & Gynaecology Director and Consultant Gynecologist, Infertility Specialist Dr Priyanka Vishwanath is an acclaimed Gynecologist. She has been a
                                                dedicated student with multiple talents in her basket. She graduated
                                                from Vydhehi Institute of Medical Science & Research Centre, Bengaluru
                                                in 2009. She then went on to complete MS OBG from Kerala University of
                                                Health Science.

                                                She wears her white coat with dignity and pride. She believes it is an
                                                honour and privilege to get to serve the public as a physician. Her field of interests are reproductive endocrinology, infertility,
                                                family planning and adolescent gynecology. Book Appointment Book your visit at a nearby center and
                                                    experience seamless healthcare.                                         Password? Send Log In × REFUND & CANCELATION Refund Policy: Once a Payment is made against a booked service, there can be no re-fund. You
                                        may however only reschedule for availing the same service from same Hospital or
                                        Clinic based on confirmation from the Hospital and Clinic. Cancel and Return
                                            policy: You may cancel a service and book a new one of equivalent amount against the
                                        payment that you might have already made. You will have to contact the hospital
                                        with your bill for the same. × TERMS & CONDITIONS Terms of Use Introduction These terms and conditions govern your use of this software/website; by using
                                        this software/website, you accept these terms and conditions in full. If you
                                        disagree with these terms and conditions or any part of these terms and
                                        conditions, you must not use this software/website. You must be at least [18] years of age to use Kare4U software/website. By using
                                        this Kare4U software/website [and by agreeing to these terms and conditions] you
                                        warrant and represent that you are at least [18] years of age. This software/website uses cookies. By using this software/website and agreeing
                                        to these terms and conditions, you consent to our Kare4Usoftware/Website use of
                                        cookies in accordance with the terms of Kare4U/website privacy policy / cookies
                                        policy. 1. Kare4U: Kare4UHealthcare Solutions Private
                                                Limited (" Kare4U ") is the author
                                        and publisher of the software Kare4U (including all
                                        files and images contained in or generated by the software, and accompanying
                                        data, together the " Software "). Kare4U also operates the
                                        internet resource www.Kare4U.in (" Website ") on World
                                        Wide Web which is used to access Kare4U Software. Kare4U Software is
                                        developed focusing on HealthCare domain predominantly to bring systems and
                                        processes in Indian Healthcare that creates a platform for better overall
                                        experience for both Provider (Hospitals, Doctors, Diagnostic
                                        Centers, Medical Labs and Pharmacies and any personnel associated with these
                                        organizations) and Consumer (Common Human " patients, doctors,
                                        any-one with access to the Kare4U) and the same helps to find, manage and
                                        organize information regarding doctors ,hospitals, pathology laboratories,
                                        diagnostic centers, medical labs, blood banks along with
                                        appointments, prescriptions, medical information, medical records,
                                        billing, inventory and accounting detail sets. 2. Protection of customer data by Kare4U: 2.1 Kare4U provides its services in "Software as a Service" model, and will host
                                        data andinformation. Kare4U will not review, share or distribute any such User
                                        data except as provided in the terms of use, or as may be required by law.
                                        Individual records of User data may be viewed or accessed only for the purpose
                                        of resolving a problem, support issues, or suspected violation of the terms of
                                        use, or as may be required by law. We would take all reasonable precautions for
                                        maintaining confidentiality of data. We are not responsible any breach of data
                                        (confidential or otherwise) 3. Payment, Fees and Taxes: 3.1 The Company shall endeavour to provide the Customer with facilities/gateways
                                        to pay the Fee through credit cards (American Express, visa and mastercard),
                                        debit cards, cash cards and internet banking. 3.2 It is understood and agreed by the User/Customer that the Services shall
                                        only commence after realization of money in the accounts of the Company incase
                                        online payment is being opted for by them. 3.3 It is understood and agreed by the User/Customer that payment mechanisms may
                                        be governed by separate/additional terms of use prescribed by the Company. 3.4 The Company reserves the right to refuse or cancel any order placed for a
                                        product/package that is listed at an incorrect price. This shall be regardless
                                        of whether the order has been confirmed and/or payment been levied via credit
                                        card. In the event the payment has been processed by the Company, the same shall
                                        be credited to your credit card account within 7-14 working days and duly
                                        notified to you by email. Once the order has been placed and in case You wish to
                                        cancel/modify the same You may do so subject to cancellation/modification
                                        charges as prescribed. 3.5 It is understood and agreed by the User/Customer that payment mechanisms may
                                        be governed by separate agreements between the third parties who provide
                                        facilities for such payment mechanism and the Company. 3.6 It is understood and agreed by the User/Customer that in no event
                                        whatsoever, the Company shall take any responsibility or liability for
                                        malfunctioning or defect in any payment procedure. Payment of the Price shall be
                                        the sole responsibility of the User/Customer. 3.7 The Company reserves the right to charge listing fees for certain listings,
                                        as well as transaction fees based on certain completed transactions using the
                                        Services through the Website or any other fee. The Company further reserves the
                                        right to alter any and all fees from time to time, without notice. 3.8 The User/Customer may be liable to pay all applicable charges, fees, duties,
                                        taxes, levies and assessments for availing the Services through the Website.
                                        Further, the Company reserves the right o change the Fees upon its sole
                                        discretion without any prior notice to the Customers/Users. 3.9 The fees could also be paid offline and be either collected personally from
                                        the User or required to be mailed to Kare4U at the following address: Kare4U,
                                        at- plot no. F/35, Chandaka Industrial Estate, Chandrasekharpur, Bhubaneswar,
                                        Dist
